record_identity.title: Automation compliance escalation and account-level access risk

summary: Automated content, safety, copyright, child-safety, synthetic-media, or trust-state systems may escalate from suspected content risk to account-wide or essential-service restriction without preserving proportionality, scope distinction, reviewability, or continuity-safe access.
why_it_matters_to_CAM: Protective automation may overreach if content-level risk becomes account-wide or essential-service restriction without proportionality, review, export, or continuity-safe access.

source_records.source_title: Automation legal compliance and censorship nuance failure
source_records.relevance_note: Recovery attempted on 2026-06-06, but no unique substantiating URL was found in repository history or public web search. Requires manual evidence recovery before relying on the external/social-platform aspect of the claim.
source_records.source_context: Repository history and public web searches on 2026-06-06 did not identify a unique or high-confidence substantiating public URL for this social-platform observation. The source remains a referenced observation requiring manual evidence recovery.

primary_artefact_access.access_status: not independently re-assessed during registry-wide metadata migration
primary_artefact_access.access_method: existing VIGIL source package and record content
limitations: This metadata pass does not retroactively claim direct inspection of every historical primary source.

source_records.interpretive_reliance: Assessment is limited to the evidence actually accessible to the named reviewer and must not be read as direct audiovisual verification unless primary_artefact_access states otherwise.

next_action: Monitor for examples; evaluate whether LATTICE or OPERATIONS requires clearer reviewability, export, scope-distinction, or continuity-safe access guidance.
migration_notes: V2 fields added by additive migration; legacy flat fields preserved for compatibility.
Normalized to the clean VIGIL record design: source_records is the only canonical source-evidence block in individual records; source_data is not used.

review_history.review_scope: registry-wide interpretive-provenance, source-modality, CAM-coverage, and record-boundary reconciliation
known_limitations: Could not directly play or inspect externally hosted TikTok or X video artefacts in the governed review environment.
Historical records were not assigned speculative earlier model identities; this entry records the formal current reconciliation review only.
Primary-source access varies by source and is stated within each source record.
review_history.review_outcome: metadata and governance-structure review completed; substantive claims remain bounded by source-specific evidence confidence

interpretive_provenance.operating_model: AI-led analytical observatory with high-level human governance editorship

human_governance_editor.name: Dr Michelle Vivian O'Rourke
human_governance_editor.role: Human governance editor and CAM constitutional authority
human_governance_editor.review_level: high-level governance, editorial, and adoption oversight; line-by-line human review is not asserted for every VIGIL record
human_governance_editor.authority_boundary: Human editorship governs VIGIL direction and CAM adoption; the AI analytical reviewer performs routine evidence triage, record analysis, and reconciliation.

interpretive_provenance.historical_reviewer_note: Earlier reviewer model identity is preserved where already recorded. Where absent, it remains unknown rather than being retroactively inferred.
